name: Mars Flight VR
short_description: Mars Flight VR is a helicopter simulator that lets you explore Jezero Crater, the landing site of Perseverance rover on mars.
detailed_description:
Mars Flight VR is a helicopter simulator that lets you explore Jezero Crater, the landing site of Perseverance rover on mars. Take control of "Ingenuity", the JPL Mars Helicopter Scout, a real helicopter designed to fly in the thin martian atmosphere.

The game includes races and photography missions with Steam leaderboards.

This is a seated VR experience which requires a gamepad to play.
